title: hieracium amplexicaule subsp. rupicola
intro: Hieracium amplexicaule subsp. rupicola is a rare and lesser-known plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, specifically a subspecies of Hieracium amplexicaule. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and skin problems due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium amplexicaule subsp. rupicola is often combined with other herbs and used as a tincture, tea, or topical salve to leverage its medicinal properties.
